overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a red jacket walking through Night City at night. The character traverses an elevated pedestrian walkway, passes the iconic 'EL PADRE SABE' graffiti mural, and continues down a narrow neon-lit downtown street with light traffic and other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian promenade with stone parapet

agents.ego_description: character in red jacket walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a stone railing, heading toward a lit convenience store in the distance

entered.detail: low stone wall with vertical slits running along the right side of the walkway
large tree with thick trunk and spreading branches growing from the plaza
tall dark building with distinctive red vertical structural elements and lit windows
tall black lamppost with cylindrical fixtures
red and yellow glowing light strips embedded in the pavement along the walkway edge
bright cyan neon sign reading '24/7' on a distant building facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated pedestrian promenade at night, bordered by a stone parapet wall on the right and illuminated by neon ground strips. Mature trees and tall buildings with red accents line the path, while a glowing convenience store sign is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk adjacent to large graffiti mural

events.description: character moves from open plaza walkway to section dominated by a large graffiti wall on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the massive graffiti-covered wall, passing the 'EL PADRE SABE' mural and skull artwork

entered.detail: large wall with prominent gold and black graffiti text reading 'EL PADRE SABE'
artistic skull painting with floral patterns adjacent to the main graffiti text
elevated highway structure visible in the distance spanning the street

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower walkway dominated by a massive graffiti mural reading 'EL PADRE SABE' in gold lettering on the right wall. The character walks past this iconic artwork as an elevated highway structure becomes visible ahead, and the convenience store sign grows larger on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow downtown street with elevated highway and neon signage

events.description: exits the graffiti wall section and enters a narrower city street with active vehicle traffic and overhead structures
character passes another pedestrian walking in the same direction on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow city street, passing other pedestrians and observing the traffic and neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk, later passed by the character
car with headlights on driving down the street alongside the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway structure running parallel to the street
tall vertical neon signs with red and yellow illumination hanging above the street
large metal roll-up door with yellow '03' numbering and security lighting
red neon sign reading 'CALIENTE' on a building facade

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow downtown street flanked by an elevated highway on the left and industrial buildings on the right. Vertical neon signs illuminate the path ahead as the character passes other pedestrians and shares the space with sparse vehicle traffic. Industrial roll-up doors and glowing business signs line the street, creating a dense urban canyon atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, elevated promenade into the dense, neon-lit corridors of a downtown urban canyon. It begins with the character walking along a pedestrian path bordered by a stone parapet and neon ground strips, flanked by mature trees and buildings with red accents. As the path narrows, the scene shifts toward a massive gold graffiti mural reading EL PADRE SABE on the right wall, while a glowing convenience store sign becomes more prominent on the left. The camera then follows the character as they transition from the walkway into a narrow street beneath an elevated highway, where the environment becomes more industrial. Finally, the scene opens into a crowded downtown stretch filled with vertical neon signs, industrial roll-up doors, and sparse vehicle traffic.
